name: @act-spec/component-angular
description: PRD-303 Angular binding for the ACT (Agent Content Tree) v0.1 component contract (PRD-300). Implements the three Angular declaration patterns (component static-field `static act = {...}`, service-based `ActContractService.register({...})`, and the page-level boundary structural directive `*actSection="contract"` plus the `<act-section>` component form), an `ActCollectorService` provided component-locally for SSR-walk extraction, the canonical SSR-walk strategy via `@angular/platform-server.renderApplication` waiting for `ApplicationRef.isStable`, the variant replay loop with a fresh `ApplicationRef` + `EnvironmentInjector` per variant, the placeholder emission contract (truncated and secret-redacted error messages, captured via Angular's `ErrorHandler` provider), the Angular 17+ peer-dependency floor, and the `BindingCapabilities` const with values pinned per PRD-303-R20 + A15 truthfulness posture. Bridges Angular component trees to the framework-agnostic `NodeDraft` shape from `@act-spec/component-contract`.
